post.description:
## Overview
Sends a message from the authenticated client to the business. The message direction is always `client_to_business` — it is set automatically by the server based on the client token.

The staff member who receives the message is auto-assigned based on the business's assignment rules and the client's existing relationships.

## Authentication
Available for **Client tokens** only. The client UID and business UID are extracted from the token — no need to pass them in the request body.

## Parameters
- `message.message` (required) — The text content of the message.
- `message.subject` (optional) — An optional subject line for the message.
- `message.entity` (optional) — Entity attachment that controls message type. When omitted, defaults to a plain text message. Set `type` to `"document"` and provide `uid` to attach an existing document.
- `matter_uid` (optional) — The UID of the conversation (matter/engagement) to add the message to. If omitted, the system uses the client's default conversation.

message.description: The text content of the message. Required.

subject.description: Optional subject line for the message.

entity.description: Optional entity attachment for the message. Controls the message type and, for document messages, attaches a file. When omitted entirely, the message type defaults to `text` (plain text message). The only supported entity type that triggers special behavior is `document` — all other values (including `text`) result in a standard text message with no attachment.

type.description:
The entity type, which determines the message type. Supported values:
- `"text"` (default) — A plain text message. No additional fields are needed.
- `"document"` — Attaches an existing document to the message. Requires `uid` to reference the document. The message will be linked to the document record and the staff member who owns the document will be auto-assigned if no other staff is resolved.

uid.description: The UID of an existing Document record to attach to the message. Required when `type` is `"document"`. The document must belong to the business associated with the client token.

object.description: Optional metadata string stored alongside the document attachment in the message data. Only used when `type` is `"document"`.

matter_uid.description: UID of the conversation (matter/engagement) to add the message to. If omitted, the system uses the client's default conversation.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing client token.

422.description: Unprocessable Entity — validation error (e.g., missing message text, invalid matter_uid).

Bearer.description: Provide a valid client bearer token in the Authorization header. Example: 'Authorization: Bearer {client_token}'
